  path={"/api/plan/register"}

Registrar Plan

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["name","is_free","price","limit_devices","limit_messages","limit_contacts"],"properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"Nombre del plan","example":"Plan Premium"},"is_free":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indica si el plan es gratuito","example":true},"price":{"type":"number","description":"Precio del plan","example":49.99},"description":{"type":"string","description":"Descripción detallada del plan","example":"Plan con todas las funcionalidades"},"limit_devices":{"type":"integer","description":"Límite de dispositivos","example":10},"limit_messages":{"type":"integer","description":"Límite de mensajes","example":5000},"limit_contacts":{"type":"integer","description":"Límite de contactos","example":1000}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Success","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"message":{"type":"string","example":"Plan registrado exitosamente"},"data":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"integer","example":1},"name":{"type":"string","example":"Plan Premium"},"is_free":{"type":"boolean","example":true},"price":{"type":"number","example":49.99},"description":{"type":"string","example":"Plan con todas las funcionalidades"},"limit_devices":{"type":"integer","example":10},"limit_messages":{"type":"integer","example":5000},"limit_contacts":{"type":"integer","example":1000}}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
